# Chapter 1: Engineering at civilization scale  (~90 pp)
- 1.1 What scale changes (12) · 1.2 The unit of analysis: from artifact to infrastructure to system-of-systems (15) · 1.3 Time horizons engineers have to learn (15) · 1.4 The engineer as one of many actors (15) · 1.5 The thesis revisited at civilization scale (12) · 1.6 Failure section: civilization-scale projects that did not understand they were civilization-scale (21)

**Archetype**: scaling, ethics. **Project**: pick one civilization-scale project the reader has heard of; trace the full set of decisions and decision-makers from inception to operation. **Exercises**: 15.
